title: ICP Alignment and Multi-Channel LinkedIn Strategy
summary: The meeting focused on aligning the Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) definition and its multi-channel strategy. Agreement was reached on ICP scoring criteria, incorporating firmographic and technographic data. A key discussion point was the sales team's direct LinkedIn connection strategy, which Jason Branham accepted despite concerns about its effectiveness as an 'obvious sales play'. The team will proceed with this as part of a broader multi-channel approach.

decisions.description: ICP definition and function confirmed for effective scoring.
Sales and client success teams to proceed with presented ICP definition.
Sales team to send direct LinkedIn connection requests to lookalike list.

actionItems.task: Provide Jason Branham with the initial 'phase zero' lookalike list.
Sales team to start sending LinkedIn connection requests using the lookalike list.

tensions: Jason Branham expressed concern that direct LinkedIn connection requests are perceived as an 'obvious sales play' and often declined.
Jason Branham stated he did not believe direct LinkedIn connections were the most effective path.
Michael Donovan expressed frustration over 'just something' efforts and lack of influence on marketing strategy.
referencesToPast: Michael Donovan mentioned 'just something is what I've been doing since October' regarding past efforts.
Michael Donovan referred to a 'repeated just something' for a website problem.
Michael Donovan asked if Jason wanted to 'get back to how it was last year'.
Jason Branham countered 'we weren't doing LinkedIn connections last year'.

contributions.description: Presented the ICP definition and its multi-channel data synthesis.
Detailed firmographic, technographic, and growth signal criteria for prospect scoring.
Proposed sales team use personal LinkedIn profiles for direct connections.
Raised concern that direct LinkedIn connections are seen as an 'obvious sales play'.
Suggested an email campaign as a more effective starting point for warming up leads.
Inquired about using a bot for sending LinkedIn connection requests for efficiency.
Emphasized the need to progress beyond 'just something' efforts for better performance.
